name: best 2048
description: 2048 is a simple yet incredibly addictive puzzle game that challenges your logic, planning, and reflexes. The goal is straightforward: slide numbered tiles across a 4×4 grid to combine matching numbers and create increasingly larger values. When two tiles with the same number collide, they merge into a new tile with double the value — 2 becomes 4, 4 becomes 8, 8 becomes 16, and so on. Your ultimate mission is to reach the legendary 2048 tile, but the real challenge is keeping the board from filling up before you get there. Every move shifts all tiles in the chosen direction, creating new opportunities but also new obstacles. A single swipe
